creator: don@whtech.com
text:
When using the CCD driver and SCSI dives, you canot edit the label on a resultant concatinated volume. Disklabel returns an error "Inappropriate file type or format" or "can't rewrite disk label" or "ioctl DIOCWDINFO: no disk label on disk;". CCD'd volumes can be mounted without the label, but upon re-boot the volume will no longer mount.

How-To-Repeat: Create a CCD'd volume using the examples in the handbook with a minimum of 2 SCSI devices
